appraisal_events.evidence: « Paroles qui avaient changé l'antipathie de Robert de Saint-Loup pour les gens du monde en une horreur autrement profonde et douloureuse... »; « son visage respirait la souffrance et la haine »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator frames Robert as emotionally worsened—his antipathy deepens into painful horror, jealousy, and hatred, leading him to cut off devoted relatives and to suspect betrayals.

status_effects.explanation: Locally he is plunged into jealousy and hatred, a marked deterioration of his emotional standing.
